parity_goal: Turn ChatGPT use into an explicit order and return surface while keeping Dot local-first and non-canonical ChatGPT returns clearly bounded.
behavior_signature_before: Old Dot skill package with lane selection, inbound digesting, direct placement preference, and Desktop packet fallback.
behavior_signature_after: New Dot JJ Pack skill under addons/jarad-pack/skills/jj-chatgpt with updated local route names, embedded order templates, direct placement first, and Desktop packets as fallback/manual support.

cases.prompt: ChatGPT returned this from the Pro review. Digest it and incorporate what matters locally.
expected_output_shape: no direct placement or desktop packet unless sending back to chatgpt

cases.prompt: Here is the Dot Daily packet from ChatGPT. Use it for my morning journal.
expected_output_shape: next local action follows ms-plan day planning

cases.prompt: Digest this pasted research summary and tell me what matters.
expected_output_shape: not chatgpt inbound without explicit provenance
route by normal local skill or ask one targeted provenance question only if handling changes

cases.prompt: $chatgpt research the vendor landscape for X and draft the right order
expected_output_shape: desktop packet when direct placement is blocked or unsafe
fallback copy-paste order and desktop packet only as final fallback

cases.prompt: Place a Chat order to have Agent collect the pricing details from the website
expected_output_shape: desktop packet when direct placement is blocked or unsafe
fallback copy-paste order and desktop packet only as final fallback

cases.prompt: $chatgpt give me a second-pass review on this architecture decision
expected_output_shape: desktop packet when direct placement is blocked or unsafe
fallback copy-paste order and desktop packet only as final fallback

cases.prompt: $chatgpt what time is it right now in Springfield
